author: Douglas Crockford
title: JavaScript: The Good Parts
description: Focuses on the powerful and elegant parts of JavaScript while avoiding the bad features.

author: Marijn Haverbeke
title: Eloquent JavaScript
description: A modern introduction to JavaScript covering fundamentals, functional programming, and the browser.

author: Kyle Simpson
title: You Don't Know JS Yet
description: Deep exploration of JavaScript core mechanisms like scope, closures, and asynchronous behavior.

author: Lea Verou
title: CSS Secrets
description: Practical techniques and tips to solve real-world CSS layout and design problems.

author: Steve Krug
title: Don't Make Me Think
description: A guide to intuitive navigation and usability for better user experience in web design.
